content.speakerText: Let me show you to the meeting room — your team's already here.
content.speakerTextCn: 我带您去会议室，您的团队已经到了。
expectedAnswers: Perfect! I'm glad they made it okay.
Awesome, thanks! Is this the main conference room?
Okay, let's go — I'm eager to get started.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正面回应了引导并确认了团队状态
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯，避免生硬或翻译腔
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'team', 'meeting room'

content.speakerText: We've got the projector set up and your agenda on the table.
content.speakerTextCn: 投影仪已经准备好了，您的议程也放在桌上。
expectedAnswers: That's so thoughtful — you've really thought of everything!
Great, thanks. Everything looks ready for the presentation.
Wow, you've done an amazing job preparing this!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了对准备工作的认可与感谢
语言准确性：是否正确使用了形容词和搭配（如 thoughtful, thought of everything）
表达自然度：是否使用了地道的口语表达，避免机械复制
关键词覆盖：是否提及了 projector / agenda / ready 等关键词
